creditsPerEuro.title: Credits Per Euro
creditsPerEuro.description: Global exchange rate that defines how many credits one euro of token cost equals. Applies to all usage-based subscriptions.
creditsPerEuro.label: Credits per Euro
creditsPerEuro.loadError: Failed to load credits per euro configuration.
creditsPerEuro.updateError: Failed to update credits per euro.
creditsPerEuro.hint: Changing this value only affects future usage records. Historical records retain their original credit values.
creditsPerEuro.notConfigured: No value has been configured yet. Please set an initial value.

fairUseLimits.title: Fair Use Limits
fairUseLimits.description: Per-tier sliding-window quotas applied to chat messages. Each tier has its own bucket so users can send more cheap-tier messages without exhausting expensive-tier capacity.

validationError.limit: Messages must be a positive integer.
validationError.windowHours: Window must be at least 0.01 hours.

imageFairUseLimit.title: Image Generation Fair Use Limit
imageFairUseLimit.description: Single global sliding-window quota applied to image generation across all users.
imageFairUseLimit.loadError: Failed to load image-generation fair-use limit.
imageFairUseLimit.updateError: Failed to update image-generation fair-use limit.

validationError.limit: Images must be a positive integer.
validationError.windowHours: Window must be at least 0.01 hours.
